emails.subject: Northern IM
emails.body: HI Shelley, Attached is a draft of the Northern IM. I would greatly appreciate it if you could read it and provide any and all editorial comments. I was hoping that you could provide the answers to the questions which Kevin forwarded to you earlier but I also would love someone to take a look at the overall IM and tell me if it is accurate, structured well, and "salesy." Kevin said that you were one of the best people to do so given your knowledge of the pipeline. Thank you so much for all of your help. If you have any questions, please feel free to call me anytime today or this weekend. Jayshree Desai 713-853-3290 (w) 713-660-9229 (H) 713-825-4539 (c)

emails.subject: FW: Northern IM
emails.body: FW: Northern IM Sorry that was the wrong draft. Here is the latest. (I am sure that there will be spelling errors but I am more focused on content and will do a really thorough spell check at the end.)

emails.subject: RE: Northern IM
emails.body: RE: Northern IM Jayshree give me a call this afternoon at your convenience. I've fact checked the IM and have a couple of questions for you and some language suggestions.

emails.subject: RE: Northern IM
emails.body: Hi Shelley, I have a meeting at 2:00-3:30 and am meeting Kevin at 4:00. Can I come to your office at 3:30?

emails.subject: RE: Northern IM
emails.body: RE: Northern IM Sounds good. I'll give you my handwritten notes. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Northern IM
emails.body: Northern IM Jayshree here are some thoughts on the IM. I still can't tie to the top customer revenue figures. Please give me a call to compare notes.

emails.subject: RE: Northern IM
emails.body: RE: Northern IM Can you send me the latest version? Also, I am expecting to shortly have the power plant numbers to add for the 1 market and 1 southend power plant per year based on actual annualized revenues from a recent market power plan (Great River) and southend (PowerTex).

emails.subject: RE: Northern IM
emails.body: Hi Shelley, Here is the latest. To: Desai, Jayshree

emails.subject: Re: Northern IM
emails.body: Re: Northern IM We should change all refernces to say top 10 customers provide 66 percent of revenues I changed that in one prior draft. The other figure is the top 15 contracts. I think we should stick to customer figures rather than mix customer and contract stats Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
